---
title: "Analysis"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Setup

```{python}
from plotnine import *  # pyright: ignore
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from hamilton import driver
from hamilton.caching.stores.sqlite import SQLiteMetadataStore
from hamilton.caching.stores.file import FileResultStore
import src.analysis as analysis
import src.analysis_utils as au
import src.style as style
from src.utils import read_env, read_xvg, activate_mpl
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import os

from hamilton import telemetry
telemetry.disable_telemetry()

_ = style

remote=False
```

```{python}
#| eval: false
if remote:
  os.environ["DISPLAY"] = 'localhost:10.0'
else:
  os.environ["DISPLAY"] = ':0'
```

# Pipeline

```{python}
#| eval: false
au.write_timestamp("hyd-us")
au.write_timestamp("hyd-us-comb")
au.write_timestamp("hyd-energies")
```

```{python}
metadata_store = SQLiteMetadataStore(path="/data/.hamilton_cache")
result_store = FileResultStore(path="/data/.hamilton_results_cache")

dr = (
    driver.Builder()
    .with_modules(analysis)
    .with_cache(
        metadata_store=metadata_store,
        result_store=result_store,
    )
    .build()
)

result = dr.execute(
    final_vars=[
        "wethyd_us_energies",
        "parameters",
        "hyd_pull",
        "hyd_distances",
        "mean_hyd_distances",
        "wethyd_choices",
        "wethyd_us_comb",
        "wethyd_us",
        "wetbreak_us"
    ]
)
```

# WIP


```{python}
energies: pd.DataFrame = result["wethyd_us_energies"]
energies
```


```{python}
result['wethyd_us']
```

## Is the TI intact?

```{python}
ti = energies[["ix_c", "ix_n", "system", "conf_d", "conf_t", "frame", "time", "c_o_carb", "c_o_oh"]]
```

```{python}
ti.query("c_o_carb >= 0.16")
```

```{python}
df = ti.groupby(["ix_c", "ix_n", "system", "conf_d", "conf_t", "frame"]).agg(
    {
    "c_o_carb": np.mean,
    "c_o_oh": np.mean,
     }
).reset_index()
```

```{python}
df
```

```{python}
p = (
    ggplot(df, aes(x="c_o_oh", y="c_o_carb", color="system"))
    + geom_point()
    + facet_wrap("~ix_c+ix_n", scales="free_y")
    + labs(x="d (nm)")
)
p.show()
```


```{python}
ti_mean = ti.groupby(["ix_c", "ix_n", "system", "conf_d", "conf_t", "frame"])[["c_o_carb", "c_o_oh"]].mean().reset_index()
```


## TI

How is the tetrameric intermediate stabilitzed?

```{python}
tiprots = energies.query("c_o_carb <= 0.16").groupby(["ix_c", "ix_n", "system", "conf_d", "conf_t", "frame"])[["n_h_oh", "n_h_oc", "n_h_qw"]].mean().reset_index()
# sutract 14*2 from n_h_qw to just get excess protons
tiprots["n_h_qw"] = tiprots["n_h_qw"] - 14 * 2
tiprots
```

```{python}
df = tiprots.melt(
    id_vars=["ix_c", "ix_n", "system", "frame", "conf_d"],
    value_vars=["n_h_oh", "n_h_oc", "n_h_qw"],
    var_name="type",
    value_name="n",
)
df["resname_c"] = df["ix_c"].apply(analysis.ix_to_resname)
df["resname_n"] = df["ix_n"].apply(analysis.ix_to_resname)
df['conf_d'] = df['conf_d'].astype(float)
df['type'] = df['type'].astype("category")
df["group"] = df["ix_c"].astype(str) + "-" + df["ix_n"].astype(str) + "-" + df["system"].astype(str) + "-" + df["type"].astype(str)
df["sys"] = df["ix_c"].astype(str) + "-" + df["ix_n"].astype(str) + "-" + df["system"].astype(str)
# df["sys2"] = df["resname_c"].astype(str) + "-" + df["resname_n"].astype(str) + "-" + df["system"].astype(str) + df["frame"].astype(str)
df["sys2"] = df["resname_c"].astype(str) + "-" + df["resname_n"].astype(str) + "-" + df["system"].astype(str)
df["sys_type"] = df["system"].astype(str) + "-" + df["type"].astype(str)
df = df.query("type != 'n_h_qw'")
```

```{python}
p = (
    ggplot(df, aes(x="conf_d", y="n"))
    # + geom_line()
    + geom_smooth(aes(color='type'), method='loess', se=False, span=0.1)
    + facet_wrap("~sys2", scales="free_y")
    + labs(x="d (nm)", y="n_H")
    + scale_color_manual(values=[style.HITS_MAGENTA, style.MPI_GREEN])
)
p.show()
```


```{python}
tidists = energies.groupby(["ix_c", "ix_n", "system", "conf_d", "conf_t", "frame"])[["solh", "proteinh", "qmh"]].mean().reset_index()
molten = tidists.melt(
    id_vars=["ix_c", "ix_n", "system", "conf_d"],
    value_vars=["solh", "proteinh", "qmh"],
    var_name="type",
    value_name="dist",
)
molten['conf_d'] = molten['conf_d'].astype(float)
molten['type'] = molten['type'].astype("category")
molten["group"] = molten["ix_c"].astype(str) + "-" + molten["ix_n"].astype(str) + "-" + molten["system"].astype(str) + "-" + molten["type"].astype(str)
molten["sys"] = molten["ix_c"].astype(str) + "-" + molten["ix_n"].astype(str) + "-" + molten["system"].astype(str)
molten = molten.query("`conf_d` < 0.5")
```

```{python}
molten.columns
```

```{python}
p = (
    ggplot(molten, aes(x="conf_d", y="dist", color="type", goup="group"))
    + geom_line()
    # + geom_smooth(aes(group='type'), color='black', method='loess', se=False, span=0.1)
    + facet_wrap("~sys", scales="free_y")
    + labs(x="d (nm)", y="distance (nm)")
)
p.show()
```


## Protdist

# Visualization

## Umbrella sampling of TS1

```{python}
hist_comb, prof_comb = result["wethyd_us_comb"]
prof_comb: pd.DataFrame
```

filter out energires that are exactly equal to 0.0
substract baseline energy around x == 0.45 +- 0.01 per group 
(resname_c, resname_n, system)

```{python}
df = prof_comb.query("E.notna() and E != 0.0")
df.loc[:,"E"] = df.groupby(["resname_c", "resname_n", "system"])["E"].transform(
    lambda x: x - x[(df["x"] > 0.44) & (df["x"] < 0.46)].mean()
)
df.loc[:,'resnames'] = df['resname_c'] + "-" + df['resname_n']
```

```{python}
p = (
    ggplot(df, aes(x="x", y="E", color="system", group="system"))
    + geom_ribbon(aes(ymin="E-dE", ymax="E+dE"), alpha=0.1, color=None)
    + geom_line(size=1.5)
    + geom_vline(xintercept=0.145, linetype="dashed", color="red")
    + geom_vline(xintercept=0.16, linetype="dashed", color="black")
    + geom_vline(xintercept=0.2, linetype="dashed", color="black")
    + geom_vline(xintercept=0.44, linetype="dashed", color="red")
    + facet_wrap("~resname_c+resname_n")
)
p.show()
```

Get delta E between x around 0.44 and x around 0.145 for each group and
add a marker column if proline ('PRO') or hydroxy proline ('HYP') is present in the resname_c or resname_n
the marker will say C if the either is in resname_c and N if it is in resname_n, otherwise
it will say None.


```{python}
dE_to_ti = df.groupby(["resnames", "resname_c", "resname_n", "system"]).apply(
    lambda x: x.query("x > 0.14 and x < 0.15")["E"].min() - x.query("x > 0.43 and x < 0.45")["E"].mean(),
    include_groups=False
).reset_index(name="delta_E")

dE_to_ti["marker"] = dE_to_ti.apply(
    lambda x: "C" if "PRO" in x["resname_c"] or "HYP" in x["resname_c"] else ("N" if "PRO" in x["resname_n"] or "HYP" in x["resname_n"] else None),
    axis=1
)
```

```{python}
p = (
    ggplot(dE_to_ti, aes(x="resnames", y="delta_E", fill='marker'))
    + geom_col(position="dodge")
    + labs(y="delta E (kJ/mol)")
    + theme(axis_text_x=element_text(rotation=45, hjust=1))
)
p.show()
```


```{python}
dE_to_ts1 = df.groupby(["resnames", "resname_c", "resname_n", "system"]).apply(
    lambda x: x.query("x > 0.16 and x < 0.2")["E"].max() - x.query("x > 0.43 and x < 0.45")["E"].mean(),
    include_groups=False
).reset_index(name="delta_E")

dE_to_ts1["marker"] = dE_to_ts1.apply(
    lambda x: "C" if "PRO" in x["resname_c"] or "HYP" in x["resname_c"] else ("N" if "PRO" in x["resname_n"] or "HYP" in x["resname_n"] else None),
    axis=1
)
# filter for single system
dE_to_ts1_single = dE_to_ts1.query("system == 'single'").reset_index(drop=True)
# and triple
dE_to_ts1_triple = dE_to_ts1.query("system == 'triple'").reset_index(drop=True)
```

```{python}
p = (
    ggplot(dE_to_ts1, aes(x="resnames", y="delta_E", fill='marker'))
    + geom_col(position="dodge")
    + labs(y="delta E (kJ/mol)")
    + facet_wrap("~system")
    + theme(axis_text_x=element_text(rotation=45, hjust=1))
)
p.show()
```

```{python}
p = (
    ggplot(dE_to_ts1_single, aes(x="resnames", y="delta_E", fill='marker'))
    + geom_col(position="dodge")
    + labs(y="delta E (kJ/mol)")
    + theme(axis_text_x=element_text(rotation=45, hjust=1))
)
p.show()
```

```{python}
p = (
    ggplot(dE_to_ts1_triple, aes(x="resnames", y="delta_E", fill='marker'))
    + geom_col(position="dodge")
    + labs(y="delta E (kJ/mol)")
    + theme(axis_text_x=element_text(rotation=45, hjust=1))
)
p.show()
```

## Umbrella sampling of TS2

```{python}
hist_comb, prof_comb = result["wetbreak_us"]
prof_comb: pd.DataFrame
```

```{python}
df = prof_comb.query("E.notna() and E != 0.0")
# df.loc[:,"E"] = df.groupby(["resname_c", "resname_n", "system"])["E"].transform(
#     lambda x: x - x[(df["x"] > 0.44) & (df["x"] < 0.46)].mean()
# )
df.loc[:,'resnames'] = df['resname_c'] + "-" + df['resname_n']
```

```{python}
p = (
    ggplot(df, aes(x="x", y="E", color="system", group="system"))
    + geom_ribbon(aes(ymin="E-dE", ymax="E+dE"), alpha=0.1, color=None)
    + geom_line(size=1.5)
    + geom_vline(xintercept=0.145, linetype="dashed", color="red")
    + geom_vline(xintercept=0.16, linetype="dashed", color="black")
    + geom_vline(xintercept=0.2, linetype="dashed", color="black")
    + geom_vline(xintercept=0.44, linetype="dashed", color="red")
    + facet_wrap("~resname_c+resname_n")
)
p.show()
```



# Cleanup jobs

To rerun certain hamilton nodes:

```{python}
#| eval: false
au.write_timestamp("hyd")
```


```{python}
dot = dr.display_all_functions()
outfile = "graph.svg"
dot.render(outfile=outfile, format="svg", cleanup=True)
html = f"""
<html>
    <h2>Hamilton DAG</h2>
    <img src="{outfile}" alt="Hamilton DAG" style="width: 100%">
</html>
"""
with open("graph.html", "w") as f:
    f.write(html)
```


```{python}
def recompute(node):
    id = dr.cache.last_run_id
    key = dr.cache.data_versions[id][node]
    dr.cache.result_store.delete(key)
    dr.cache.metadata_store.delete(key)

def clear_cache():
    dr.cache.metadata_store.delete_all()
    dr.cache.result_store.delete_all()
```

```{python}
# | eval: false
import shutil

shutil.rmtree("./.hamilton_cache", ignore_errors=True)
```
